sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_partial_sort (id UInt32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayPartialSort(3, values) AS sorted_partial FROM test_array_partial_sort;
UPDATE test_array_partial_sort SET values = arrayPartialSort(2, values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPartialSort(4, values) AS sorted_partial FROM test_array_partial_sort WHERE id = 2;
